title: Results review

red_flags.text: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.
red_flags.rationale: Supports laboratory-result and medicine-change review context for named chronic conditions only.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

investigations.text: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.
investigations.rationale: Supports documenting reviewed results, previous comparisons, and clinician-directed follow-up testing without interpreting the results.
investigations.evidence_extract: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

source_limitations: Broad results-review identity and aliases, reason for review, current symptoms, patient concerns, all negative findings, physical examination, critical-result classification, significant abnormality, worsening trend, urgency, explanation, questions, pending results, fixed follow-up, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
The workflow must not interpret results, infer urgency, or suggest management unless the clinician documents it.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
